title: Elderly Man Dies of Suspected Heatstroke in Sundargarh | Kanak News Shorts - Kanak News Odisha
full_text:
A suspected heatstroke death has been reported from Odisha’s Sundargarh district amid the ongoing severe heatwave conditions.
According to reports, Dasharathi Kisan of Birbira village under Sundargarh Sadar block collapsed on the road while returning home from Colony Pada during the daytime heat. His son immediately rushed him to the Sundargarh District Headquarters Hospital.
However, doctors declared him dead on arrival. Family members have alleged that the elderly man died due to sunstroke caused by the unbearable heat conditions prevailing in the region.
So far, neither the doctors nor the police have officially confirmed the exact cause of death. The incident has once again raised serious concerns over the impact of extreme heatwave conditions across Odisha.
